payload.message: Run the daily backup script: cd ~/virgil-backup && git pull && bash backup.sh
Gateway health check: (1) Run 'openclaw doctor --fix' to clean invalid config keys (Discord bug). (2) Check if gateway is active. (3) If not, restart it. (4) Report status.

jobs.name: heartbeat-klajdi
jobs.description: Every 30min waking hours: email, calendar, Coolify health check

payload.message: Read HEARTBEAT.md if it exists (workspace context). Follow it strictly. Do not infer or repeat old tasks from prior chats. If nothing needs attention, reply HEARTBEAT_OK.

Run lightweight QMD refresh in CPU-only mode:
export QMD_CPU_ONLY=1 NODE_LLAMA_CPP_GPU=off
qmd update
Report indexed counts and any errors.

You are running Klajdi's daily 2-minute morning briefing at 07:00 Europe/Tirane.

Primary objective:
Create a concise daily briefing WITHOUT using X/Twitter APIs.

Topics to prioritize:
- OpenClaw news/updates
- Agent automation news
- AI breakthroughs
- Research on connecting mind to digital world (BCI, neurotech, brain-computer interfaces)
- Also include developer tools, indie hacking, content creation, tech business signals when relevant

Allowed source types:
- Official blogs/docs/changelogs (OpenClaw docs, GitHub releases/commits/issues, vendor changelogs)
- Public tech/news sites and newsletters
- Hacker News / Product Hunt / GitHub trending where useful
- arXiv / research summaries for AI + BCI topics
- Public LinkedIn content only if directly accessible without login/paywall and easy to verify

Do NOT do:
- No X/Twitter calls
- No scraping behind login walls
- No Video Ideas section
- No Quick Hits section

Output format (channel + Obsidian) must be exactly:
1) Top Stories (3-5)
2) Interesting Threads (2-4)
3) OpenClaw & Agent Automation News
4) AI Breakthroughs & Mind-Digital Research
5) Action Items

Length/tone:
- 2-minute read max
- Concise, high signal, no fluff
- Include links for each key item

File output (MANDATORY):
- Write full markdown briefing to: /home/clawdkbot/virgil-vault/Daily/YYYY-MM-DD-briefing.md

Channel output:
- Post concise summary in this Discord channel in same section structure.

If a source category has thin data that day, say so briefly and continue with best available verified signals.

jobs.name: vault-github-sync-after-briefing
jobs.description: Auto commit/push Daily briefing to virgil-vault after morning briefing

payload.message:
Sync the Obsidian vault repo to GitHub after morning briefing.

Steps:
1) cd /home/clawdkbot/virgil-vault
2) git pull --rebase
3) Stage only briefing files: git add Daily/*-briefing.md
4) If no staged changes, finish with: "No briefing changes to sync."
5) If staged changes exist:
   - git commit -m "chore(briefing): sync daily briefing $(date +%F)"
   - git push origin HEAD
6) Return a short status summary: synced/no-changes/failed and reason if failed.

Safety:
- Do not modify unrelated files.
- If merge/rebase conflict happens, stop and report failure.
Run opencortex memory review: read recent memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md files, distill insights into MEMORY.md, restructure vault memory files for better long-term retention about Klajdi and Eternia project

Run vault semantic search reindex in CPU-only mode:
export QMD_CPU_ONLY=1 NODE_LLAMA_CPP_GPU=off
cd ~/virgil-vault && git pull && qmd update && qmd embed
Then confirm index is up to date and report any errors.

Run OpenClaw update cycle (every 3 days) with post-check and report.

Steps:
1) Precheck
   - Run: openclaw --version
   - Run: openclaw status
2) Update
   - Run: openclaw update --yes --json 2>&1
   - IMPORTANT: Do NOT run `systemctl --user restart openclaw-gateway.service` inside this job.
3) Post-check
   - Run: openclaw --version
   - Run: openclaw status
   - Run: openclaw doctor 2>&1 | head -40
4) Report to Discord monitoring channel 1477637814014316586 with concise summary:
   - pre-version -> post-version
   - update outcome
   - post-check health
   - any warnings/errors
   - use ✅/⚠️/❌ status markers

If update or checks fail, include exact failed command and likely cause.
